hypothesis_variant.summary: fold-local intraday volume clock phase rank run
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: This is not C0055 range ladder acceptance, C0054 late-session inventory unwind, C0053 opening range retest, C0052 orderflow dislocation recovery, C0051 gap continuity decay, C0050 volatility transfer, C0049 execution-path resilience, C0034 effort-price absorption, C0023 tick participation pressure, C0024 calendar rhythm, or execution-friction retry work. It tests closed-M5 cumulative tick-volume clock phase: whether the market is moving through the day on a fast or slow volume clock, whether short-window volume acceleration or deceleration changes directional price-per-volume efficiency, and whether recent volume climax plus post-climax compression marks continuation or reversal. It is not a threshold, window, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, capital, materialization, ONNX, or retry-only nudge.

notes: MT5 validation remains mandatory even if proxy KPI is weak.
Schedule replay does not create runtime, materialization, ONNX, promotion, or live authority.
